name: GENCO SHIPPING & TRADING LTD
summary: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited is a New York City-based pure-play drybulk ship owning company focused on seaborne transportation of commodities globally. It transports iron ore, coal, grain, bauxite, steel products, and other drybulk cargoes. After expected deliveries in March 2026, its fleet will consist of 45 drybulk vessels including Newcastlemax, Capesize, Ultramax, and Supramax vessels with approximately 5,044,000 dwt aggregate capacity.

products.name: Major Bulk Shipping
products.description: Transportation of iron ore, coal, and bauxite via Newcastlemax and Capesize vessels on worldwide shipping routes.

products.name: Minor Bulk Shipping
products.description: Transportation of grains, steel products, cement, scrap, fertilizer, and other drybulk cargoes via Ultramax and Supramax vessels.

products.name: Time Charter Services
products.description: Index-linked and fixed-rate time charters including longer-term contracts of affreightment depending on market conditions.

products.name: Spot Market Voyage Charters
products.description: Short-term vessel employment providing transportation of goods between load port and discharge port.

partnerships.description: Technical management joint venture providing day-to-day vessel management, maintenance, crew arrangements, and operations for Genco's fleet.
